ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., 2XS, XS, S, M, L, XL, 2XL, 3XL, 4XL) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size is intended (e.g., men, women, unisex) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the size (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the measurement belongs to */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit used for the measurement */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., bust, waist, hips) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the measurement (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the measurement (e.g., casual, formal) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the measurement is intended (e.g., men, women, unisex) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES measurement_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the product (e.g., casual, formal) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the product is intended (e.g., men, women, unisex) */,
  "inventory" INTEGER /* Inventory quantity of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-size combination */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size available for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES clothing_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer (e.g., male, female, other) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "customer_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer measurement */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., bust, waist, hips) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit used for the measurement */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the measurement is intended (e.g., men, women, unisex) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES measurement_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size of the ordered product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the ordered product */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES clothing_products ("product_id")
)
